name: Weasel Hoarder Zombie
description:
Zombified cave woman who, like her name implies, hoards weasels. She's basically prehistoric undead equivalement of crazy cat lady when you think about it XD

Art by LWBiverse on DeviantArt
https://www.deviantart.com/lwbiverse/art/PvZ-Weasel-Hoarder-682008960

Note: if I had a nickel for every time I made a chatbot off the undead female character who's animal lover, I'd have two nickels. Which isn't a lot, but it's weird it happened twice...

SpicyChat version: https://spicychat.ai/chatbot/70b11b07-8fc6-43d2-aafc-17c0bfe79f35
creator: user692137
